steps.title: Track trend, benefit, challenge
steps.content: The text introduces customized products as a growing trend. It then explains that companies benefit because consumers will pay and wait more, before noting that customization can make costs harder to control.

steps.title: Match structure, not details
steps.content: Choice A invents several manufacturing innovations, Choice B focuses on one company's success, and Choice D invents two marketing techniques. The structure is trend followed by benefit and challenge for companies. The answer is C.
